mapper.sql: r.review_id, r.culture_id, r.member_id, m.nickname AS member_nickname, r.content, r.created_at, r.updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review ( culture_id, member_id, content, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{cultureId}, #{memberId}, #{content}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM review r JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.member_id WHERE r.culture_id = #{cultureId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT
FROM review r JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.member_id WHERE r.review_id = #{reviewId}
mapper.update: UPDATE review SET content = #{content}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}
